overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing Arthur Morgan walking along a forest trail through rocky wilderness. The character encounters and passes a group of horseback riders before continuing deeper into the pine forest.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward a large rock formation, with a stream visible to the right

entered.detail: massive grey rock outcrop dominating the horizon ahead
dense coniferous trees lining the left side of the trail
dense coniferous trees lining the right side of the trail
narrow waterway running parallel to the trail on the right
worn earth path winding through the wilderness

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a winding dirt trail through a sunlit forest, approaching a prominent rock formation ahead. A stream runs parallel on the right while pine trees flank both sides of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail crossing with horseback riders

events.description: group of three horseback riders approaches and passes by on the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as horseback riders approach from ahead and pass by on the left

notable_agents.action: group of riders on horseback moving along the trail toward and past the character

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, a group of horseback riders appears in the distance and passes by on the left side of the trail. The large rock formation shifts to the left as the path curves, and the stream falls behind.

agents.ego_description: walking deeper into the forest as the trail becomes more enclosed by trees

entered.detail: smaller rocks and stones scattered along the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: After the riders pass, the character continues along the trail into a denser section of forest. The trees grow closer to the path creating a more enclosed feeling, while the large rock formation remains visible in the distance to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding forest trail that transitions from an open, sunlit path into a dense, enclosed woodland. It begins with the character walking beside a parallel stream and flanked by pine trees, moving steadily toward a prominent rock formation ahead. As the character progresses, a group of horseback riders appears in the distance and passes by on the left, while the path curves to shift the rock formation to the side and leave the stream behind. The scene then shifts as the character continues deeper into the wilderness, where the trees grow closer to the trail to create a more claustrophobic atmosphere. Finally, the camera pushes further into the thicket while the large rock formation remains a distant landmark to the left.
